title: NoHUD by Wondarkus
description: This resource pack removes the HUD from the game!
body:
The "NoHUD" resource pack removes the hotbar, health, food, and experience bars. It can be useful for roleplay purposes and for enhancing the quality of screenshots.


**Download alive version for transparent health and hunger icons!**

**Download stable version to hide all icons!**


**Check the [gallery](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/nohud-by-stratous/gallery) to see how it looks in game**
